g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the FastAPI /analyse endpoint receive and validate?')
sendPrompt('How does FastAPI enqueue a Celery task and return a job_id?')
sendPrompt('How does a Celery worker pick up and begin executing an analyse_part task?')
sendPrompt('How does the Celery task invoke Layers 1 through 5 of the pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How are completed task results stored in Redis for polling?')
sendPrompt('How does the client poll GET /job/{id} and receive the final result?')
sendPrompt('What job states should I track in the Redis result backend?')
sendPrompt('How do I update job state to RUNNING when a Celery worker starts?')
sendPrompt('What does a SUCCESS job state response body look like?')
sendPrompt('How should FAILURE state be handled — retry, DLQ, or surface immediately?')
sendPrompt('When should a job be put into RETRY state vs failing permanently?')
sendPrompt('How do I implement a Celery chord for parallel assembly component analysis?')
sendPrompt('How does Prefect coordinate a multi-step assembly analysis flow?')
sendPrompt('What observability should I add to the orchestration layer?')
